title: depends_on cycle fixture
problem: Three subtasks form a depends_on cycle (0 -> 1 -> 2 -> 0). The validator must detect via Kahn's topological sort that the cycle exists and exit fatal. Used by run-plan-validator-cases.sh to assert exit 3.
acceptance_criteria: Every sub-task lands as an independent PR with verifiable evidence in the PR body and CI gate passes.

tasks.title: alpha
tasks.description: Alpha sub-task description padded to satisfy the >=200 char rule. This sub-task depends on beta, which depends on gamma, which depends back on alpha. The validator must detect this depends_on cycle via Kahn's topological sort.

tasks.title: beta
tasks.description: Beta sub-task description padded to satisfy the >=200 char rule. Depends on gamma, which depends on alpha. Together with alpha and gamma this forms a three-node depends_on cycle that must trigger a fatal exit from the validator.

tasks.title: gamma
tasks.description: Gamma sub-task description padded to satisfy the >=200 char rule. Depends on alpha, completing the three-node depends_on cycle (0 -> 1 -> 2 -> 0). The validator must report a depends_on cycle detected error.
